name: ICD Coding — GI Bleed with Anemia and Ankylosing Spondylitis
description: Level 2 — MIMIC hadm 22585261 — 4 diagnoses: GI bleed, hematology, musculoskeletal
prompt: Patient: Male, 44 years old. Urgent transfer from outside hospital. Hematemesis and melena for 2 days. History of chronic epigastric pain and chronic NSAID use for ankylosing spondylitis. Vital signs: BP 100/70, HR 110. Labs: Hgb 8.3 g/dL, RBC 2.52 million/uL, INR 1.3, albumin 3.3 g/dL, BUN 21 mg/dL. Endoscopy: chronic duodenal ulcer with active hemorrhage, duodenitis. Treatment: Pantoprazole, Epoetin Alfa, iron supplementation, vitamin K. Diagnoses: Chronic duodenal ulcer with hemorrhage, Acute posthemorrhagic anemia, Ankylosing spondylitis, Duodenitis. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).

codes.description: Chronic or unspecified duodenal ulcer with haemorrhage
Ankylosing spondylitis of unspecified sites in spine
